violations.text: The establishment does not have a proper allergen statement for self-service food items. EMPLOYEES must be properly trained in FOOD safety, including FOOD allergy awareness, as it relates to their assigned duties. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Chicken wings and mini tacos were observed held at 120-130 degrees Fahrenheit in the pizza warmer. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, foods were placed in the unit under an hour prior to inspection. PIC elected to dispose of foods at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the back storage area. Chemicals were relocated to proper area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

A list of ingredients for self-service food items (taquitos/hot dogs, hot sandwiches, pizza, chicken wings) were not available upon request. Bulk FOOD that is available for CONSUMER self-dispensing shall be prominently labeled with the following information in plain view of the CONSUMER: The manufacturer's or processor's label that was provided with the FOOD or A card, sign, or other method of notification that includes the information. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The door to the walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair (not-tightly fitted/sealing). Equipment must remain in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Chicken wings was observed held at (123) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC disposed of wings. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

Apples were observed being stored on fruit display without being protected from consumer contamination. FOOD on display shall be protected from contamination.PIC informed and removed apples. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

The following physical facilities observed with debris: 1.floors in walk in cooler observed with soil residue and debris 2.floors under shelves in retail area dust, soil residue, and/or other debris. 3.floors under equipment in back prep and storage areas have soil residue, dust, and other debris. 4.fans in walk in cooler and ceiling vents in bathroom observed with dust 5.walls behind soda storage observed with accumulation of splashed soda syrup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

The several ceiling tiles throughout the establishment were in poor repair (observed with water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
